name: A Touch Of Class Limo Svc
recent_news: Florida corporation 'A Touch Class Limo Service Inc' (P03000098809) filed 9/9/2003 at 5620 Palm Ave, Port Orange; status INACTIVE — administratively dissolved 10/1/2004 for failure to file annual report. No evidence of active school-bus contracting; entity appears defunct.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Two-employee livery/limo entity at a residential-style address, administratively dissolved 20+ years ago; no confirmed school-district contracts or yellow-bus fleet. Skip for Summit tuck-in.

name: Assisted Transport Svc
recent_news: No corporate, press, or district-contract footprint located for 'Assisted Transport Svc' at 1721 Brewton Cir, Deltona (a residential address). Search returned only unrelated Volusia-area NEMT providers (Elite Star, Volusia Medical Transport, AllCare). Likely a one-vehicle owner-operator NEMT/assist-transport.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Two-employee, residential-HQ NEMT-style operator with no confirmed school-district or McKinney-Vento SPED contracts. Sub-scale even for a Summit tuck-in.

name: Daytona Beach Limousines
recent_news: Listed in business directories (Central Index) at 200 Fentress Blvd, Daytona Beach as 'Public Transport.' Fentress Blvd also hosts Volusia County Schools Student Transportation (separate entity); no evidence Daytona Beach Limousines holds school-bus district contracts. Appears to be a small livery/limo operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Limousine/livery service rather than a yellow-bus contractor; two employees, no district relationships identified. Skip for Summit tuck-in.

name: Lovette Transportation
recent_news: No corporate filing, website, news, or Volusia County Schools contractor reference found for 'Lovette Transportation' at 502 Blackstone Ave, Deltona (residential address). Phone is an Orlando 407 area code. No school-bus operator footprint located.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Two-employee, residential-address operation with zero verifiable school-transport activity. Below Summit's tuck-in threshold.

name: A Touch Class Limousine Svc
recent_news: No active corporate, district-contract, or news footprint located for this Hialeah entity at 5803 W 28th Ave. Search surfaced unrelated 'A Touch of Class' limo brands in West Palm Beach (closed) and Fresno, CA. Miami-Dade school-bus permitting pages reference other small Hialeah contractors (e.g. J&M Vera) but not this entity.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Two-employee livery-style operator with no confirmed yellow-bus or Miami-Dade SPED contracts; common 'Touch of Class' name creates identification noise. Skip for Summit tuck-in.
